items.name: AppShell
items.doc:
Cross-platform shell facade used by the viewer and host applications.

On desktop it wraps `DesktopShell`; mobile variants are re-exported separately.

items.name: nav-items
items.doc: Navigation items rendered in the shell navigation surface.

items.name: active-slot
items.doc: Id of the currently active content slot.

items.name: show-toolbar
items.doc: Controls whether the desktop toolbar row is visible.

items.name: toolbar-items
items.doc: Toolbar buttons rendered below the desktop menu bar.

items.name: status-text
items.doc: Status text shown in the desktop status bar.

items.name: progress
items.doc: Optional progress value for the desktop status bar. Negative hides it.

items.name: slot-changed
items.doc: Fired when navigation changes the active slot id.

items.name: toolbar-clicked
items.doc: Fired when a toolbar button is activated.
